title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Nocil - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Nocil - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Nocil in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nocil:
Nocil is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nocil!
